# Passd

Passd is a UK driving instructor comparison platform operated by Passd AI Ltd.

## What Passd does

Passd helps learner drivers in the United Kingdom find, compare and contact DVSA-registered driving instructors near them. Learners search by postcode and compare instructors side by side on pass rate, hourly price, availability, specialist support and verified reviews.

## Who it is for

- Learner drivers looking for their first driving instructor
- Learners who have had a bad experience and want to switch instructor
- Learners with specific needs (nervous drivers, intensive courses, manual or automatic, accessibility requirements)

## How it works

1. Learner enters their postcode
2. Passd returns a ranked list of local DVSA-registered ADI instructors
3. Learner compares pass rate, price, availability and reviews
4. Learner sends an enquiry directly to their chosen instructor

## For driving instructors

Driving instructors can list their profile on Passd. Three tiers are available: Free, Verified and Premium. Premium accounts receive guaranteed placement in positions 1–3 for their registered postcode area. All instructor profiles are verified against the DVSA ADI register before approval.

## Key facts

- Free for learner drivers to use
- All instructors verified against the DVSA ADI register
- Covers the whole of the United Kingdom
- Operated by Passd AI Ltd, registered in England and Wales
- Contact: hello@passd.co.uk
- Website: https://passd.co.uk

## Common questions Passd answers

- How do I find a driving instructor near me?
- How do I compare driving instructors by pass rate?
- How much do driving lessons cost in my area?
- How do I find a driving instructor who teaches nervous drivers?
- How do I find an automatic driving instructor near me?
- What is a good pass rate for a driving instructor?
- How do I book driving lessons?
